title: Kutaren's Perfect Vanilla
description: Perfect pack for me and my friends to play vanilla
body:
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b47c6067878de8da9de8f045494c8665f271dff_0.webp)


### Ku, guys 
Created this pack with love. Primary to play with my friends

There will be no Jenny's Mod or Kalashnikovs instead of swords here. Just optimisation and quality of life mods, updated GUI and resource packs that pleasantly transform the vanilla version and make it more lively and beautiful.

The modpack also includes shaders with my settings.


#
### Skin's settings

To give the skin animated eyes, configure it using this [tool](https://catothecat.itch.io/fresh-moves-skin-tool) – it takes a minute, but the result is fantastic.

![Eyes Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/861c18cc5e6f62ef95d8807f0ef419bc4aef0e4a.jpeg)


> I'm not adding HMI mod because it break some other packs. However, I'm very excited to add the [Locomotion](https://github.com/Trainguy9512/locomotion) to my modpack when it's released — it's so much better with animations and has a more interesting impact. For now, you can add it yourself
